items.title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
items.description: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

items.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
items.description: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.

items.title: Inside NATO's extraordinary 48 hours that revealed Trump's grip on global diplomacy
items.description: Steve Sedgwick goes behind the scenes of NATO's dramatic 48 hours, where Trump's changing tone reshaped diplomacy and left allies guessing.

items.title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
items.description: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.

items.title: Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles.

items.title: Florida's Palm Beach airport renamed for Trump
items.description: Palm Beach International Airport is now called President Donald J. Trump International Airport, the FAA said Thursday.

items.title: Anduril CEO says it's bad to IPO in ‘middle of a hype cycle’
items.description: Anduril recently hit a $61 billion valuation, becoming one of the most highly valued private tech companies.

items.title: It's a jam-packed afternoon of developments impacting 7 portfolio stocks
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
items.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.

items.title: Kalshi traders think gas prices will stay higher for longer as U.S.-Iran tensions heat back up
items.description: Odds that gas prices are above $3.50 on Election Day have jumped to 75% on the platform.

items.title: A huge trade just happened on the Nasdaq 100. Bulls are taking notice
items.description: Tech bulls may not have to wait much longer for fresh highs, if the single-biggest trade in the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF on Thursday is any indication.

items.title: Oil prices fall 2% as mediators try to prevent U.S. and Iran from returning to war
items.description: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.

items.title: Kalshi traders see roughly 50% odds of a rate hike in 2026 as Fed is split on policy
items.description: Wednesday's Fed minutes showed a divided outlook on where interest rates are headed this year. Traders on Kalshi see a 54% likelihood of a hike before 2027.

items.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
items.description: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.

items.title: Palo Alto CEO Arora says AI pricing needs to fall 90% as token costs skyrocket
items.description: Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora said high token costs could prevent businesses from adopting artificial intelligence at scale.

items.title: Trump claims to be 'No. 1' on TikTok. What does that mean?
items.description: Trump is the most followed world leader on the app, with nearly 17 million followers.

items.title: Arkansas is America's Most Improved State in 2026 as workers move to Walmart's home for low costs, high quality of life
items.description: Arkansas is the Most Improved State for Business in CNBC's annual Top States rankings, as working-age adults are attracted by low costs and quality of life.

items.title: Action-starved traders look to small-cap stocks for the next big move
items.description: One of the biggest options trades in the entire market Thursday seems to suggest small caps might lead the next move up or down.

items.title: Alleged Reflecting Pool vandal David Hearn pleads not guilty; lawyer calls him 'scapegoat'
items.description: "If Mr. Hearn can be charged with a felony for touching the Reflecting Pool, every American is at risk," a lawyer said as he blasted the Trump administration.

items.title: Anthropic appoints former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke to its independent trust
items.description: Members of the trust advise Anthropic leadership and do not hold any equity in the company.
